content: The line "All happy families are alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way" was written by Leo Tolstoy. It is the opening sentence of his novel "Anna Karenina."
raw_content: The line "All happy families are alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way" was written by Leo Tolstoy. It is the opening sentence of his novel "Anna Karenina."
